service.name: Cohere Command R+ API
service.description_for_ai: Cohere flagship model for enterprise. Best RAG performance with document grounding and citations. Supports 23 languages. 128K context. Used by Oracle, Salesforce, HubSpot. Best choice for document-heavy enterprise AI.

auth.cost: Command R+: $2.50/$10 per 1M tokens. Command R: $0.15/$0.60

capabilities.description_for_ai: Chat with document grounding. Pass documents and model cites them in response. Best RAG model for enterprise document Q&A.

documents.description: [{title: str, text: str}] documents to ground answer in

agent_hints.citations: Response includes citations array mapping answer text to source documents — crucial for enterprise trust.
agent_hints.connectors: Add {id: web-search} to connectors for live web grounding without separate search call.
agent_hints.languages: Best multilingual enterprise model — covers 23 languages natively.
